examples: Tessitura signifies the general compass of a particular part, which may be high, low or normal for a voice.
Technically, klapa singers express their mood by means of open guttural, nasal sotto voce and falsetto singing, usually in high-pitched tessitura.
One of Mr. Daniels's arias, with its lower tessitura, didn't project, and Ms. Harvey's sometimes excessive vibrato seemed calculated to reach the back of the hall, no matter what.
